Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar Jun-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Jun-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Continued To Apr-06-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth H. Dale for Trustee, Adrian Keith-Ruud, via Court Call.
Charlotte Prozan, in propria persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Prozan stated that she is here to object. The Petition for Approval and Settlement of Claims is continued to April 6, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Clerk reminded Ms. Prozan to file her written objections by next week and to deliver courtesy copies to dept 202.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
